'''âb-d-t''' ('''badata''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:perceiue|perceiue]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-d-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:perceiue|perceiue]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-d-t
|-
! Lemma
| badata
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:badatithi|badatithi]] || [[word:badatiji|badatiji]] || [[word:badatishi|badatishi]] || [[word:badati|badati]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:badatuthuth|badatuthuth]] || [[word:badatujuj|badatujuj]] || [[word:badatushush|badatushush]] || [[word:badat|badat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:badatuthu|badatuthu]] || [[word:badatuju|badatuju]] || [[word:badatushu|badatushu]] || [[word:badatu|badatu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:badatufuth|badatufuth]] || [[word:badatufuj|badatufuj]] || [[word:badatufush|badatufush]] || [[word:badatuf|badatuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:badatethe|badatethe]] || [[word:badateje|badateje]] || [[word:badateshe|badateshe]] || [[word:badate|badate]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:badatothoth|badatothoth]] || [[word:badatojoj|badatojoj]] || [[word:badatoshosh|badatoshosh]] || [[word:badat|badat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:badatotho|badatotho]] || [[word:badatojo|badatojo]] || [[word:badatosho|badatosho]] || [[word:badato|badato]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:badatofoth|badatofoth]] || [[word:badatofoj|badatofoj]] || [[word:badatofosh|badatofosh]] || [[word:badatof|badatof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:badatĂŻf|badatĂŻf]] || [[word:badatĂŻf|badatĂŻf]] || [[word:badatĂŻf|badatĂŻf]] || [[word:badatĂŻf|badatĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:badatĂŻfĂŻf|badatĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:badatĂŻfĂŻf|badatĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:badatĂŻfĂŻf|badatĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:badatĂŻfĂŻf|badatĂŻfĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:badatĂŻf|badatĂŻf]] || [[word:badatĂŻf|badatĂŻf]] || [[word:badatĂŻf|badatĂŻf]] || [[word:badatĂŻf|badatĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:badatĂŻf|badatĂŻf]] || [[word:badatĂŻf|badatĂŻf]] || [[word:badatĂŻf|badatĂŻf]] || [[word:badatĂŻf|badatĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:badatĂŠthĂŠ|badatĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:badatĂŠjĂŠ|badatĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:badatĂŠshĂŠ|badatĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:badatĂŠ|badatĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:badatathath|badatathath]] || [[word:badatajaj|badatajaj]] || [[word:badatashash|badatashash]] || [[word:badat|badat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:badatatha|badatatha]] || [[word:badataja|badataja]] || [[word:badatasha|badatasha]] || [[word:badata|badata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:badatafath|badatafath]] || [[word:badatafaj|badatafaj]] || [[word:badatafash|badatafash]] || [[word:badataf|badataf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:badatasha|badatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gobadatasha|gobadatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokibadatasha|gokibadatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:badatnĂŒsha|badatnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gobadatnknĂŒsha|gobadatnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokibadatnĂŒsha|gokibadatnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:badatshĂ«sha|badatshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobadatnkshĂ«sha|gobadatnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibadatshĂ«sha|gokibadatshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:badatrosha|badatrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobadatnkrosha|gobadatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibadatrosha|gokibadatrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:badatmusha|badatmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gobadatnkmusha|gobadatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibadatmusha|gokibadatmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:badatsherasha|badatsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gobadatnksherasha|gobadatnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokibadatsherasha|gokibadatsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:badatngasha|badatngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gobadatnkngasha|gobadatnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokibadatngasha|gokibadatngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:badatyasha|badatyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gobadatnkyasha|gobadatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokibadatyasha|gokibadatyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:badatyamasha|badatyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gobadatnkyamasha|gobadatnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokibadatyamasha|gokibadatyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:badatnĂŒshĂ«sha|badatnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobadatnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gobadatnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibadatnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokibadatnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:badatnĂŒrosha|badatnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobadatnknĂŒrosha|gobadatnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibadatnĂŒrosha|gokibadatnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:badatnĂŒmusha|badatnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobadatnknĂŒmusha|gobadatnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibadatnĂŒmusha|gokibadatnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:badatshĂ«nĂŒsha|badatshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobadatnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gobadatnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibadatshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokibadatshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:badatshĂ«rosha|badatshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobadatnkshĂ«rosha|gobadatnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibadatshĂ«rosha|gokibadatshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:badatshĂ«musha|badatshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobadatnkshĂ«musha|gobadatnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibadatshĂ«musha|gokibadatshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:badatronĂŒsha|badatronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobadatnkronĂŒsha|gobadatnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibadatronĂŒsha|gokibadatronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:badatroshĂ«sha|badatroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobadatnkroshĂ«sha|gobadatnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibadatroshĂ«sha|gokibadatroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:badatromusha|badatromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobadatnkromusha|gobadatnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibadatromusha|gokibadatromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:badatmunĂŒsha|badatmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobadatnkmunĂŒsha|gobadatnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibadatmunĂŒsha|gokibadatmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:badatmushĂ«sha|badatmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobadatnkmushĂ«sha|gobadatnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibadatmushĂ«sha|gokibadatmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:badatmurosha|badatmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobadatnkmurosha|gobadatnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibadatmurosha|gokibadatmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:badat|badat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:bĂŠdĂŠt|bĂŠdĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hobadat|hobadat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hobĂŠdĂŠt|hobĂŠdĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohobadat|hohobadat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohobĂŠdĂŠt|hohobĂŠdĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒbadat|nĂŒbadat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒbĂŠdĂŠt|nĂŒbĂŠdĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒbadat|nĂŒnĂŒbadat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒbĂŠdĂŠt|nĂŒnĂŒbĂŠdĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻbadat|nĂŻbadat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻbĂŠdĂŠt|nĂŻbĂŠdĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻbadat|nĂŻnĂŻbadat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻbĂŠdĂŠt|nĂŻnĂŻbĂŠdĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lubadat|lubadat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lubĂŠdĂŠt|lubĂŠdĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulubadat|lulubadat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulubĂŠdĂŠt|lulubĂŠdĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:libadat|libadat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:libĂŠdĂŠt|libĂŠdĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilibadat|lilibadat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilibĂŠdĂŠt|lilibĂŠdĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kobadat|kobadat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kobĂŠdĂŠt|kobĂŠdĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokobadat|kokobadat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokobĂŠdĂŠt|kokobĂŠdĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kebadat|kebadat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kebĂŠdĂŠt|kebĂŠdĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekebadat|kekebadat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekebĂŠdĂŠt|kekebĂŠdĂŠt]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
